words.definition: That which has significance; a sign; a token; a symbol.
words.indonesian: Arti significant dalam konteks pembelajaran IELTS.
words.example: significant is often used in formal and academic English.

words.definition: To set aside for a purpose.
words.indonesian: Arti allocate dalam konteks pembelajaran IELTS.
words.example: allocate is often used in formal and academic English.

words.indonesian: Arti enhance dalam konteks pembelajaran IELTS.
words.example: enhance is often used in formal and academic English.
